MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber: cause called for settlement conference, counsel and parties are present in court, counsel meet in chambers with Judge Wick to discuss settlement, case settles and Judge Wick works with counsel to prepare a written agreement.
